price: Keineswegs! Das Buch der Sittenlosen ist wahrlich in Siggin.
arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَٰبَ ٱلۡفُجَّارِ لَفِي سِجِّينٖ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: kallā inna kitāba al-fujāri lafī sijjīnin
